hooks.command: FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | xargs uv run pre-commit run --files 2>&1; else uv run pre-commit run --all-files 2>&1; fi
git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'docs/design.md' && echo 'DOCS SYNC NEEDED: docs/design.md was modified — update docs/design.mmd and docs/finops.md to match' || true
